creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #55)

In:

QUOTE
Of course, ignoring the USB LUNs would not make
the multi-drive context work, though it could
let the microsd card boot occur for the example
context that cause the bugzilla entry.
END QUOTE

"work" was meant to be "as the boot drive". I
was not trying to imply anything about FreeBSD
being unable to use the drives.

Ignoring the multiple-storage-LUNs on a a device
likely would make things operate if those LUNs
were never to be boot media.
